paragraphs: I'm a self-driven DevOps and Cloud Engineering student who believes the fastest way to learn infrastructure is to build something real, watch it fail spectacularly, and reverse-engineer why...
hashwithharsh started as a place to dump my notes. It became something I'm proud of.
Right now I'm deep in AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, and GitHub Actions. If it can be automated, I'm automating it.
